name: Glassmorphism
description: Frosted glass effect with transparency and blur
implementation: background: rgba(255 255 255 / 0.1); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); border: 1px solid rgba(255 255 255 / 0.2); border-radius: 16px
use_cases: SaaS dashboards fintech cards modern overlays
do_examples: Use on cards over gradient backgrounds; keep blur 8-16px; add subtle border
dont_examples: Apply to entire page background; use without backdrop-filter support fallback; stack multiple glass layers

name: Neumorphism
description: Soft extruded UI with dual shadows
use_cases: Calculator apps music players toggle switches
do_examples: Use sparingly for interactive elements; keep to single background color; ensure sufficient contrast
dont_examples: Use for text-heavy content; apply to entire layouts; use on dark backgrounds

name: Brutalism
description: Raw bold design with harsh elements
implementation: border: 3px solid black; box-shadow: 4px 4px 0 black; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase
do_examples: Use for headlines and CTAs; embrace asymmetry; pair with bold typography
dont_examples: Apply to healthcare or finance; use for long-form reading; ignore accessibility

name: Minimalism
implementation: max-width: 680px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 4rem 2rem; line-height: 1.8; color: #333
do_examples: Use generous whitespace; limit color palette to 2-3 colors; focus on typography
dont_examples: Leave pages feeling empty; sacrifice usability for aesthetics; hide navigation

name: Dark Mode
description: Dark backgrounds with light text and accent colors
do_examples: Reduce pure white text to #f8fafc; use accent colors for interactive elements; respect prefers-color-scheme
dont_examples: Use pure black #000 background; use pure white #fff text; ignore contrast ratios

name: Gradient Mesh
description: Multi-color gradient backgrounds with mesh patterns
implementation: background: linear-gradient(135deg #667eea 0% #764ba2 100%); can use CSS mesh gradient generators
do_examples: Use as hero backgrounds; animate subtly; pair with white text and glass cards
dont_examples: Use as body background; combine too many colors; animate aggressively causing motion sickness

name: Flat Design
description: Clean solid colors with no shadows or gradients
implementation: No shadows; solid background colors; simple icons; clear hierarchy through size and color only
use_cases: Mobile apps education platforms productivity tools
do_examples: Use consistent icon sets; maintain clear visual hierarchy; use color meaningfully
dont_examples: Make everything the same visual weight; lose depth entirely; ignore hover states

name: Material Design
description: Google's design system with elevation and motion
implementation: box-shadow elevation system; 8dp grid; ripple effects on interactions; 4px border-radius
use_cases: Android apps Google ecosystem enterprise tools
do_examples: Follow the elevation system; use ripple feedback; maintain 8dp grid
dont_examples: Mix with iOS design patterns; ignore touch targets; skip motion guidelines

name: Retro/Vintage
description: Nostalgic design with vintage color palettes
implementation: Muted warm colors; serif fonts; texture overlays; rounded corners; grain effects
use_cases: Food brands craft businesses creative portfolios
do_examples: Use authentic vintage color palettes; add subtle grain texture; pair vintage and modern fonts
dont_examples: Sacrifice readability; overdo texture effects; use for professional services

name: Organic/Natural
description: Soft shapes with earthy tones and natural textures
implementation: border-radius: 30% 70% 70% 30% / 30% 30% 70% 70%; earth tone palette; subtle grain
do_examples: Use blob shapes for visual interest; earthy muted palette; organic illustrations
dont_examples: Use harsh geometric shapes; neon colors; aggressive animations

name: Bento Grid
description: Grid-based layout with varied card sizes like bento box
implementation: display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4 1fr); gap: 1rem; varied span sizes
do_examples: Vary card sizes for visual hierarchy; use consistent border-radius; add hover interactions
dont_examples: Make all cards the same size; overcrowd the grid; ignore mobile responsiveness

name: Split Screen
description: Two-column layout with distinct content sections
implementation: display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; min-height: 100vh; contrasting sides
use_cases: Landing pages comparison sections about pages
do_examples: Use contrasting colors or content types; ensure mobile stacking works; add scroll interactions
dont_examples: Force split on mobile; use for text-heavy content; ignore readability

name: Hero Typography
description: Oversized typography as the main visual element
use_cases: Agency sites product launches brand pages
do_examples: Use variable fonts for weight animation; add subtle text effects; ensure responsive sizing
dont_examples: Use for body content; ignore loading performance of large fonts; sacrifice readability

name: Claymorphism
implementation: background: #f2f2f2; border-radius: 24px; box-shadow: inset 2px 2px 4px rgba(255 255 255 0.8) inset -2px -2px 4px rgba(0 0 0 0.1)
use_cases: Playful apps education platforms kids products
do_examples: Use soft pastel colors; keep rounded corners; add subtle inner shadows
dont_examples: Apply to serious professional contexts; use harsh colors; skip the inner shadow
